prestazioni: Engine: Ford Performance Aluminator XS 5.2L V8 (engine code: *Voodoo* with *Predator* cross-plane crankshaft), stroked to 5.4L via Manley 4.100" forged crankshaft, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), and Manley H-beam connecting rods for 850+ HP on E85 with a Whipple 4.5L Gen 5 supercharger (18 psi boost) and Whipple billet throttle body (105mm).

Drivetrain: Tremec TR-9070 7-speed dual-clutch transmission with upgraded carbon fiber twin-disc clutch (McLeod RST 10.5" dual-disc) and Ford Performance 3.73:1 Torsen differential with billet aluminum differential cover (BMR Suspension) and upgraded half-shafts (DSS Racing 4340 chromoly).

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for 1,800 lb/in front springs, 1,200 lb/in rear), BMR Suspension tubular K-member, adjustable rear subframe connectors, and polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension). Braking: Brembo GT 6-piston front (405mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (380mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Body: Roush Performance widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, quarter panels, and front splitter) with custom Eleanor-style side scoops (hand-laid fiberglass, functional for brake cooling). Rear diffuser: Anderson Composites carbon fiber GT3-style diffuser with integrated dual-exit exhaust cutouts (for Borla Atak 3.5" cat-back system).

Aero: Vortex Generator Tech carbon fiber rear wing (adjustable 0-15° angle, 65" span) with integrated third brake light. Front canards: APR Performance GT-250 carbon fiber canards (3-piece set) for downforce at high speeds. Hood: Carbon Creations GT500 carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractors and custom Eleanor-style louvered vents.

Interior: Recaro Pole Position carbon fiber bucket seats (Schroth 6-point harnesses), custom roll cage (Autopower bolt-in 8-point cage with integrated harness bar), and MOMO Mod.78 carbon fiber steering wheel (14.5" diameter) with integrated AEM CD-7 dash display. Shift knob: B&M Ripper billet aluminum (Tremec TR-9070 specific).
